Programs

Civil Aviation Transportation Management (English)

MENU

Civil Aviation Transportation Management (English) program offers a comprehensive education for students who want to adapt to the rapidly evolving global travel and transportation industry. The three-year program aims to provide students with practical operational skills to make an immediate impact on the industry, as well as develop strategic thinking and leadership abilities.

The one-year English preparatory phase of the program offers students the opportunity to develop the skills to communicate effectively at an international level. Our graduates can be employed in a variety of sectors, including airlines, airports, airport ground handling, catering and cargo companies and other aviation authorities. All of our aviation programs offer Vocational English courses and a flexible curriculum taught by our academic staff who work in leading companies in the industry. Students are provided with opportunities to do internships and make important connections in the sector, supporting them in finding a job after graduation.
